title: POP-UP PROTEST AT FOUR CORNERS

title: Fitchburg Civic Days block party - volunteer!
description: Friday, July 3, is the Fitchburg Civic Days block party on Boulder Drive, and Indivisible Fitchburg is hosting a table.

title: GOOD TROUBLE LIVES ON
description: Join us for our favorite thing - an overpass standout!
location: Park at the Wachusett train station and walk to the overpass
